items.title: San Francisco mayor pushes for tougher rules after the Waymo traffic fiasco
items.summary: In the wake of a massive hours-long gridlock event, San Francisco Mayor Daniel Lurie has told state regulators its time to put more requirements on robotaxi operators like Waymo.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: A White House teleprompter operator reportedly won big betting on presidential speeches
